message:
🌱 Add buildpacks: Allow caching all layers in the remote registry mission (#1146)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@ +{ + "version": "kc-mission-v1", + "name": "buildpacks-491-allow-caching-all-layers-in-the-remote-registry", + "missionClass": "solution", + "author": "KubeStellar Bot", + "authorGithub": "kubestellar", + "mission": { + "title": "buildpacks: Allow caching all layers in the remote registry", + "description": "Allow caching all layers in the remote registry. Requested by 5+ users.", + "type": "feature", + "status": "completed", + "steps": [ + { + "title": "Check current buildpacks setup", + "description": "Verify your buildpacks version and configuration:\n```bash\npack version\n```\nThis feature requires a working buildpacks installation." + }, + { + "title": "Review buildpacks configuration", + "description": "Review the relevant buildpacks configuration:\nI probably wrongly was assuming that layers with `cache = true` in their `.toml` will be cached in the remote registry, in addition to local volume cache." + }, + { + "title": "Apply the fix for Allow caching all layers in the remote registry", + "description": "## Summary\nAdds a `--cache-image ` flag that will push all `cache=true` layers to the `cache-image-name` image. This PR only supports pushing to a remote registry (so the `--publish` flag must be used as well).\n\nthe `cache-image` will allow subsequent rebuild to fetch these layers\n```yaml\nAdding cache layer 'paketo-buildpacks/maven:cache'\nWarning: Failed to export cache: committing cache: saving image 'index.docker.io/donthedinosaur/some-java-image.build:latest': failed to write image to the following tags: [index.docker.io/donthedinosaur/some-java-image.build:latest: PATCH https://index.docker.io/v2/donthedinosaur/some-java-image.build/blobs/uploads/21145335-2d37-4b98-8c76-2e2ff3a0f6cc?_state=REDACTED: unexpected status code 504 Gateway Timeout:

504 Gateway Time-out

\nThe server didn't respond in time.\n\n\n]\n```" + }, + { + "title": "Upgrade buildpacks to include the fix", + "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade buildpacks:\n```bash\n# Check current version\npack version\n# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/buildpacks/pack\n```" + }, + { + "title": "Verify the feature works", + "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Allow caching all layers in the remote registry\" is functioning correctly." + } + ], + "resolution": { + "summary": "## Summary\nAdds a `--cache-image ` flag that will push all `cache=true` layers to the `cache-image-name` image. This PR only supports pushing to a remote registry (so the `--publish` flag must be used as well).\n\nthe `cache-image` will allow subsequent rebuild to fetch these layers and speed up rebuilds.\n\nNote that only remote cache images are supported at this time.", + "codeSnippets": [ + "Adding cache layer 'paketo-buildpacks/maven:cache'\nWarning: Failed to export cache: committing cache: saving image 'index.docker.io/donthedinosaur/some-java-image.build:latest': failed to write image to the following tags: [index.docker.io/donthedinosaur/some-java-image.build:latest: PATCH https://index.docker.io/v2/donthedinosaur/some-java-image.build/blobs/uploads/21145335-2d37-4b98-8c76-2e2ff3a0f6cc?_state=REDACTED: unexpected status code 504 Gateway Timeout:

504 Gateway Time-out

\nThe server didn't respond in time.\n\n\n]", + "description = \"Test image for pack PR970\"\n\n[[buildpacks]]\n image = \"gcr.io/paketo-buildpacks/dotnet-core:0.0.9\"\n version = \"0.0.9\"\n\n[[buildpacks]]\n image = \"gcr.io/paketo-buildpacks/go:0.2.8\"\n version = \"0.2.8\"\n\n[[buildpacks]]\n image = \"gcr.io/paketo-buildpacks/java-native-image:4.5.0\"\n version = \"4.5.0\"\n\n[[buildpacks]]\n image = \"gcr.io/paketo-buildpacks/java:4.5.0\"\n version = \"4.5.0\"\n\n[[buildpacks]]\n image = \"gcr.io/paketo-buildpacks/nginx:0.0.194\"\n version = \"0.0.194\"\n\n[[buildpacks]]\n image = \"gcr.io/paketo-buildpacks/nodejs:0.0.10\"\n version = \"0.0.10\"\n\n[[buildpacks]]\n image = \"gcr.io/paketo-buildpacks/procfile:3.0.0\"\n version = \"3.0.0\"\n\n[[buildpacks]]\n image = \"gcr.io/paketo-buildpacks/ruby:0.1.7\"\n version = \"0.1.7\"\n\n[lifecycle]\n version = \"0.10.1\"\n\n[[order]]\n\n [[order" + ] + } + }, + "metadata": { + "tags": [ + "buildpacks", + "incubating", + "app-definition", + "feature" + ], + "cncfProjects": [ + "buildpacks" + ], + "targetResourceKinds": [], + "difficulty": "intermediate", + "issueTypes": [ + "feature" + ], + "maturity": "incubating", + "sourceUrls": { + "issue": "https://github.com/buildpacks/pack/issues/491", + "repo": "https://github.com/buildpacks/pack", + "pr": "https://github.com/buildpacks/pack/pull/970" + }, + "reactions": 5, + "comments": 11, + "synthesizedBy": "copilot" + }, + "prerequisites": { + "tools": [ + "pack" + ], + "description": "A working buildpacks installation or development environment." + }, + "security": { + "scannedAt": "2026-03-15T06:24:25.462Z", + "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0", + "sanitized": true, + "findings": [] + } +}
